query: South Korea KOSPI foreign investor net buy/sell value weekly latest June 2026, recent trend in trillion won
answer:
I've completed the research. Here's a summary of the key findings on KOSPI foreign investor flows:

**Latest data (late June 2026) — strongly net-selling, accelerating:**
- **June 30 (morning):** Foreign net sell **₩1.77 trillion** (KOSPI 8,290)
- **June 29:** Foreign net sell **over ₩7.7 trillion** — the **largest single-day net sell on record**
- **Week of June 23–27:** Combined foreign + institutional net sell **₩16.64 trillion**; KOSPI −7.08%, two circuit breakers in one week

**Brief mid-June reversal:**
- **June 12:** Foreigners net bought **₩1.7 trillion** (first net-buy in 25 sessions), sparking an 8%+ rally on Middle East ceasefire optimism

**Broader 2026 trend ("Sell Korea"):**
- **May:** Record monthly net sell of **₩47.02 trillion** (5th straight month)
- **YTD (early June):** Record **~₩103 trillion** net sold on KOSPI
- Paradoxically, foreign ownership ratio hit an **all-time high above 35%** because KOSPI's price gains lifted the value of remaining holdings

**Key caveat:** June 29–30 figures are intraday/morning snapshots; final settled daily data from KRX may differ. KRX leadership frames the outflows as portfolio rebalancing after KOSPI's 108.85% YTD / 76% (2025) gains rather than loss of confidence, with retail and domestic institutions consistently absorbing the selling.
